name: position-management-video
description: 仓位管理视频 - Remotion 项目

scripts.build: remotion render entry.tsx PositionManagement out/position-management-1080p.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.build-hd: remotion render entry.tsx PositionManagement out/position-management-4k.mp4 --codec h264 --width 3840 --height 2160
